violations.text: Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. Door gaskets must be maintained in good condition. New Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2024
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 01/24/2024

Kitchen was observed with a hood system, hood system was observed with an excess of Debris. Establishment is to have hood system serviced. Currently establishment only uses kitchen to house refrigerators for food pantry. New Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2024
